h66be3990gd74bg4bb4gb7c1g24de054083a6: My word, you did it! Ha! Oh, it's good to be alive!
h8e1a7dffg4a31g45a3g8224g8185591cea68: My hands are still cold so that handshake will have to wait, but in the meantime: thank you!
h52a5750dg7836g4dbfga242g89fb702b5e28: It's a relief to be back on beautiful Faerûn. The dreariness of the Fugue Plane oppresses one's soul so very quickly.
hef600b4ag2bcag47b3g8202g9fabb5342695: That said, I assume you have some questions for me.
h66fae86dg20bdg42b6g8a89g321013c4ac8d: Only fair to warn you I've precious few answers to spare.
h52ee319dg4c47g495cg9512g5a4852151158: I apologise if that sounds thankless. It's just that some secrets simply cannot be revealed.
h1acf2b89g3e19g4cf4g9cafg548de3acf88b: I've seen the darkness inside of you, remember? I already know.
h957fdfb9g0beeg4a70g84b1gb381c17bb1b6: You don't know. Not really. But after all you've done for me, I do suppose I should be at least a little bit forthcoming.
he0716f7dgf24fg439cga5f7g6cc29fbe55b2: Tell you what: I will answer one question that you may have.
h3ef8dc84g81f8g4731g89adg1566ca8247da: To the best of my ability.
h32895101g9db2g46d7ga781g4edd4a5f513b: I simply want to know what it is you're keeping from me.
he6fcad58g22afg4d7cg94d2g8721133c4c53: I am dangerous. Not because I want to be, but because of... an error I made in the past.
h598a737bg314fg47d9g97b8g74dff7e7fa6e: I told you how I sought to win the favour of Mystra. I did this by trying to control a form of magic only one wizard ever could.
ha995b0c0g8053g4733g87aagd4bb467e4355: I failed to control it. Instead it infested me.
h3088b967g8e58g4890gbbf8gba5666d42c7d: It makes me dangerous - even in death.
h3f1ef769gb9b4g4cd7g9813g130a9acc0e2d: You brought me back to life, and for that I'm in your debt, but we're surrounded by danger. It could happen again.
h6cc76b52g7244g4beagbe6cgbe57fc6f33e9: If it does, bring me back again. You must. For the sake of many.
hc5602ea4g9406g4fbeg879fg450097992e24: Why did your projection say that many lives depended on your resurrection?
h7d4163f1gdf22g4432gaccbg89d3445036a7: Because it was the truth, and the truth is a great motivator.
h0124612bgd1b0g4425g83efg59ac2b09b0cd: When I told you I need powerful magic to keep my condition under control, I didn't tell you why. Well, here's part of the why:
he8bc2104g93b8g4153ga01dgaa6801cd76b1: The darkness inside you, what is it?
h363bdd07g333cg4e19g8e52g6beeea279349: It is magic  from another time and another place. It is something that is beyond me, yet inside me.
hf75c58c9gce58g4bddgb654geddbd69277ea: That makes me dangerous - even in death.
haf1cadfag15b4g4b10ga5ddg5eae6f8309aa: Actually, never mind. If it makes you this uncomfortable, I won't insist.
hbeae33afg51adg4956gb2e4gadac005035fc: That's... Well, that's very kind of you. If the roles were reversed I don't know if I'd have your patience.
hdcceff88g797dg44d5ga06eg84b7c2a918c7: There's no knowledge in a glimpse of darkness. My secrets are still my own.
h140c7f74ga331g430cg9b99g706183267683: You told me you trusted me. Here's your chance to prove it.
h578ddb0egbcf2g4c88g9021g557409700b10: I did say that. And I did mean it. And I do suppose that after all you've done for me, I should be at least a little bit forthcoming.
h3098fdf2gf9f5g4161g9bebge17662b6e204: I do trust you. But some things... Some things are kept in the dark for good reason.
h6ca35973gda36g4941g9325g8189d0bf2cf5: I brought you back to life. A few answers is the least you can spare me.
h4467505ag5b92g4a5cg9caag6865d0614cba: I... I suppose that after all you've done for me, I should be at least a little bit forthcoming.
he9ae7c24gf351g4c97gab2egdf0be8646c34: And yet, there's too much a few answers could undo...
h5db39733g5fbbg46c1g9632g73f592e2e5c7: I will have answers or I will put you in the ground myself.
h45b60d24g3658g4229g8d44g9072f2fdaea6: I think I've already proven I take my secrets to the grave.
h51b9c4b2g4013g4274ga0bcgf7e6a4fe1803: You know what? It's fine. You will tell me when you're ready.
he0cbfc9age33bg4509gbb3cg67e42fb107c0: I'd like to point out that if anything, your protocol was a bloody nuisance.
h99f02a62g2a37g4485g81dag8afe17911b7b: But a necessary one! Scrolls of True Resurrection don't grow on trees, you know.
h75d8a094g7672g4e8egb9f7g96f1ba30ef27: Yes, I was afraid you'd say that.
